lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Balchar, your sling! Press J to swing it. Hold J to charge a ranged shot!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Press into a wall and jump to wall-jump. You can climb tall walls this way!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: This looks like a safe spot. Llorencc might set up shop here someday.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: I can see the exit up ahead! Keep going, Balchar!
